map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: *Is too busy consuming fistfuls of sand to say anything*

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: I can't find my nose, *you* must have it, thief!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Hey, so I might be a little lost.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: This is *not* what I signed up for.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: It's a me, and I'm your problem now!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Oh yeah, it's all Oochin' together!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Is playing the triangle supposed to be this hard!?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Ok, but don't run away this time!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Oh, hi there, fighty fighty time?
